name: Jacky Rosen, me
subject: need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Team - after Mitch McConnell admitted that the battle for the Senate majority will be fought in Nevada, he didn't wait long to try to tilt the scales for Republicans: **A McConnell-linked Super PAC announced an $11.2 million ad buy against me in an effort to keep Nevada in the GOP 's hands, but the good news is a group of generous supporters is MATCHING every donation ahead of our end-of-month deadline. [(Give right now to help us stop Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate! Your gift will be doubled!)](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd184/4fbb2af3/7ad83c72/5e8b44a7/2950842739/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgyMi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk822-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
It's clear why the GOP is desperate: With everything from the Supreme Court to Obamacare on the line this fall, what happens in Nevada's Senate race will decide the future of this country.
**This news couldn 't have come at a worse time - because we're falling short of our critical end-of-month fundraising goal.**
If we miss this goal, we could lose our chance to win in Nevada - and Democrats' best shot at taking back the Senate and protecting the future of the Supreme Court. **So I 'm counting on you to give right now:**
**[Please, give a matched donation of $5 or more now- every dollar you can before our critical end-of-month deadline - to win in Nevada, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd184/4fbb2af3/7ad83c72/5e8b44a7/2950842739/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgyMi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk822-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd184/4fbb2af3/7ad83c72/5e8b44af/2950842739/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd184/4fbb2af3/7ad83c72/5e8b44ac/2950842739/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd184/4fbb2af3/7ad83c72/5e8b44ad/2950842739/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support.

Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax-deductible.

name: staff@martinheinrich.com
subject: The real fight is about to begin:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | We haven't seen an online contribution from you yet this year, but Martin needs your help right now.

**_[We're almost 100 days to Election Day, and that means the real fight to defend Martin's Senate seat is beginning. Help us hit our goal before Sunday so we can defeat the GOP this November ->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-++if+consfirstname++consfirstname++w+else&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2")_**

**Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:**

This Sunday, we'll reach a major milestone: 100 days to election day.

**_[This is crunch time, and I need your support more than ever.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+This+is+crunch+time+and+I+need+your+supp&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2")_**

This is the time of year when Republicans traditionally start organizing voters and running ads. But this year, Republicans got a head start -- they have already contacted over 20 million voters, and the Koch brothers have already started running digital ads against me.

_**The stakes are too high in this election for us to be playing catch-up. With health care, the environment, women 's rights, and so much else on the line, it is more important than ever that we get organized and fight back as soon as possible.**_
**[STOP THE GOP>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+STOP+THE+GOP+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2")** We are not going to get a second chance at this election. I only have 103 days left to fight back against Republican attacks and organizing so I can win re-election.

**_[My team and I have set a major fundraising goal to mark Sunday's milestone: $40,000 in online donations by midnight Sunday. My campaign is powered by people like you, and I need your help to hit this goal and keep my campaign moving full steam ahead.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+My+team+and+I+have+set+a+major+fundraisi&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2")** **[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2")** ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2")** Thanks for standing with me as we enter the final push to take back the Senate and put our country back on track.

Martin

**[Contribute](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+Contribute&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180726_2_2")**
---

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Mike Siegel
subject: New poll shows TX-10 in play

Peter,

Last night I opened my email to a welcome surprise, as **the Texas Democratic Party highlighted my campaign. We are one of the Texas Congressional seats now in play!**

According to Quinnipiac, **[Democrats are up 12 points nationally](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1747433/9257621/-1945810093?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjI2ODJhMC1hOTkxLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QP09sE9Rwn7jjmHpSRZl5-9E1Dd6SnK5cqU94I4i9xo=&ReleaseID=2558)** , which far exceeds the typical Republican advantage in TX-10.

We have a lot of work to do, of course. [**Help us reach every voter in this District by donating $20 or more today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1747434/9257622/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjI2ODJhMC1hOTkxLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QP09sE9Rwn7jjmHpSRZl5-9E1Dd6SnK5cqU94I4i9xo=). Every week, more and more voters are responding to our message of protecting the safety net and restoring common decency to government.

With your help, we will win!

Mike

subject: U.S. Steel is back
body:
| |
---
The White House • July 27, 2018
# Earlier this Morning
President Donald J. Trump announced second-quarter GDP growth of 4.1 percent—putting America on track to hit its highest annual average growth rate in more than a decade. [Watch the President’s announcement here.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI3LjkzMDU3NjAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNy45MzA1NzYwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwMDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?time_continue=3&v=pSPOl2VulIQ?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# **U.S. Steel is back**
**“Hiding in plain sight** in a suburb of St. Louis is one of the great success stories of President Donald J. Trump’s tough trade policies,” National Trade Council Director [Peter Navarro](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI3LjkzMDU3NjAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNy45MzA1NzYwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwMDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/trump-steel-tariffs-bring-hope-prosperity-back-granite-city/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) says. “This is the rebirth of the Granite City steelworks, idled in 2015 — along with about 2,000 steelworkers — under a drowning flood of subsidized foreign imports.” **President Trump visited Granite City** yesterday, where U.S. Steel is restarting its blast furnaces and putting hundreds of Americans back to work. “Our steel towns became ghost towns. More than 70,000 hardworking Americans lost their jobs, their hope, and their way of life,” President Trump told workers in Illinois. “After years of shutdowns and cutbacks, today the blast furnace here in Granite City is blazing bright.” **It’s never been a better time** to enter the American workforce. For the first time on record, “there are more job openings in the economy today than there are people looking for jobs,” Labor Secretary Alex Acosta told students during a visit with President Trump to Northeast Iowa Community College. That statistic is crucial for Americans on welfare, as work programs offer the surest pathway out of poverty. **Watch:** [President Trump’s tariffs bring hope, prosperity back to Granite City.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI3LjkzMDU3NjAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNy45MzA1NzYwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwMDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h8dbt8MAhgc?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**** **More****:**[Work is the best way to escape poverty—and the numbers prove it. ](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI3LjkzMDU3NjAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNy45MzA1NzYwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwMDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/welfare-work-requirements-will-ease-poverty-improve-labor-force/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## **Something to share: ‘Made in America’ from all 50 states**
**President Trump hosted** his second “Made in America” showcase at the White House this week. Companies large and small joined the celebration on the South Lawn—“products made with American heart, American sweat, and American pride,” the President said. [See what great product represented your home state.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI3LjkzMDU3NjAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNy45MzA1NzYwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwMDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/see-great-american-made-products-across-50-states/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)****
# **We need to hear the stories of persecution**
**“Nations that reject religious freedom** breed radicalism and resentment in their citizens,” Vice President Mike Pence said at the first-ever Ministerial to Advance Religious Freedom yesterday in Washington, D.C. “They sow the seeds of violence within their borders—violence that often spills over into their neighbors and across the world.” **To advance the cause of religious freedom** , America needs partners the world over. So this week, the State Department brought together religious leaders, survivors of religious persecution, and delegations from foreign governments for this inaugural ministerial. **“We need to hear the stories** of those persecuted, tortured, falsely imprisoned, and killed for their faith,” Secretary of State Mike Pompeo says. “We can [honor their sacrifices](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI3LjkzMDU3NjAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNy45MzA1NzYwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwMDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/religious-persecution-iran-china-must-end-now/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) by preventing these atrocities from happening again.” [Watch: “We will not rest ... until ISIS is driven from the face of the earth.”](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI3LjkzMDU3NjAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNy45MzA1NzYwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwMDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://twitter.com/VP/status/1022506069824745472)**** **More:**[Free Pastor Andrew Brunson, Vice President Pence warns ](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI3LjkzMDU3NjAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNy45MzA1NzYwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwMDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://twitter.com/VP/status/1022498496484499456)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks on trade and celebrates the recently reopened Granite City Works steel plant** | July 26, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI3LjkzMDU3NjAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNy45MzA1NzYwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwMDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI3LjkzMDU3NjAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNy45MzA1NzYwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwMDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&109&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI3LjkzMDU3NjAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNy45MzA1NzYwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwMDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&110&&&http://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/new?preferences=true)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Why am I hopeful?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
** Why am I so hopeful?
------------------------------------------------------------

This month so far has been filled with joy! We have been busy at the county fairs happening all over the district, we have had a couple of Town Hall events, and we have continued our work reaching out to voters. We are excited to find that many people of all stripes are coming out to support Ian and that gives us hope.

** We have big plans for GOTV!
------------------------------------------------------------
We also just sat down as a team to talk about our "Get Out the Vote" plan and I left that meeting more hopeful than ever! There was good news and bad news in that meeting, the good news is that the votes are here for us to win here in CD6, the bad news is that we are running out of time to raise the money we need to reach all the voters that we need. Realistically we need $50,000 to fund our Get Out the Vote plan, which means we need to raise $17,000 every month until the election.

Everything that we have accomplished so far is all thanks to you and your ongoing support of our campaign. I cannot put into words how much we all appreciate your investment in our future. Everything from our yard signs to the candy we hand out at parades, are the result of a community of supporters who have chipped in to be a part of this campaign. Donate today keep our campaign on the path to victory.

clean_body: Why am I so hopeful? This month so far has been filled with joy! We have been busy at the county fairs happening all over the district, we have had a couple of Town Hall events, and we have continued our work reaching out to voters. We are excited to find that many people of all stripes are coming out to support Ian and that gives us hope. We have big plans for GOTV! We also just sat down as a team to talk about our "Get Out the Vote" plan and I left that meeting more hopeful than ever! There was good news and bad news in that meeting, the good news is that the votes are here for us to win here in CD6, the bad news is that we are running out of time to raise the money we need to reach all the voters that we need. Realistically we need $50,000 to fund our Get Out the Vote plan, which means we need to raise $17,000 every month until the election. Everything that we have accomplished so far is all thanks to you and your ongoing support of our campaign. I cannot put into words how much we all appreciate your investment in our future. Everything from our yard signs to the candy we hand out at parades, are the result of a community of supporters who have chipped in to be a part of this campaign. Donate today keep our campaign on the path to victory. Team Sisolak

name: Elliot Hecht
subject: Keep our new TV ad on air
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

Earlier this week, we sent you our first TV ad of the general election. It's a powerful spot that highlights Mel's background and the Hoosier values he grew up with.

We need to make sure we reach as many voters as possible with our new ad, friends, and we're counting on your help.

[**Chip in $5 right now to fund our first TV ad buy of the general election and keep Mel 's story on air.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/dZP4wFtiyZCU07DSM35j_fl7KtTQ2_zxucOsz9A-_BU=/kDmkoLh09WZ2UYQ2hRYlXUP9UWFGuZl91y28wfqIjio=?refcode=em180727)

Mel was raised to believe that what you do speaks louder than what you say.

It's that principle that led him to serve as a minister. It's also why Mel pledged to reject congressional perks, refuse corporate PAC money, and limit himself to three terms.

**Mel will take the values he 's learned throughout his life to ****fight****for all Hoosier families -- but first, he 's counting on us to spread his message and story. Contribute $5 right now to fund our new ad. **

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Asking for advice, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Hi Derek -

I wanted to bump this questionnaire my team sent around yesterday.

[Just a few quick questions about some of what's happening in the news and in our country lately. If you haven't filled it out yet, you can do so by clicking here.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f122d/3e0906/6eee1a25/3e35d4dd/2604234205/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/july-questionnaire?source=20180727_1_POLL_TK_Issues-poll-TK-FWD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Just+a+few+quick+questions+about+some+of&utm_campaign=20180727_1_POLL_TK_Issues-poll-TK-FWD")

Every day, I want to make sure I am putting in the work to represent the best interests of Virginians. Hearing from you every step of the way helps make that possible.

Thanks,

_Tim_ | [**START BRIEF QUESTIONNAIRE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f122d/3e0906/6eee1a25/3e35d4dc/2604234205/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/july-questionnaire?source=20180727_1_POLL_TK_Issues-poll-TK-FWD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+START+BRIEF+QUESTIONNAIRE&utm_campaign=20180727_1_POLL_TK_Issues-poll-TK-FWD")
---

\----------FORWARDED MESSAGE----------

FROM: News Questionnaire - Team Kaine
SUBJECT: Stressed about the news? Tell us about it (seriously, fill this out ->)
Derek, it's been quite a hectic (and honestly, difficult) last few weeks.

Tim has been wearing a lot of hats: Debating with opponent Corey Stewart to a packed audience, campaigning with our House candidates across the Commonwealth, and going to hearings, votes and committee meetings day in and day out in the Senate.

There's a lot to do when you're fighting for the issues that are at the moral core of who we are as Vigrinians.

[Will you answer some quick poll questions on some of the issues that have been in the news lately? Hearing from you lets us know how things really are on the ground, and how Tim can best represent you.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f122d/3e0906/6eee1a25/3e35d4d3/2604234205/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/july-questionnaire?source=20180727_1_POLL_TK_Issues-poll-TK-FWD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+answer+some+quick+poll+question&utm_campaign=20180727_1_POLL_TK_Issues-poll-TK-FWD")

**We 'll get these answers to Tim [tomorrow](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f122d/3e0906/6eee1a25/3e35d4d2/2604234205/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/july-questionnaire?source=20180727_1_POLL_TK_Issues-poll-TK-FWD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+tomorrow&utm_campaign=20180727_1_POLL_TK_Issues-poll-TK-FWD") \- he always looks forward to hearing about the things you bring to our team's attention.**

We know it's hard - okay, exhausting - to keep up with the news cycle, but we appreciate how vigilant you stay. So please, keep paying attention, keep forming opinions, and keep speaking out to let others know what you believe.

Because we're listening.

_Team Kaine_

name: Team Menendez
subject: Bob Hugin is only focused on one thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
**" Hugin slammed for anti-women, anti-gay record"**
_\- New Jersey Globe, 7/22/18_

[**We can't let Bob Hugin erase his misogynistic and bigoted past. It 's never mattered more to have Democratic Senator Bob Menendez fighting for New Jersey. Chip in $5 or more to help make sure voters know they can't trust Hugin to fight for them.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ca8/3af3c5d/3bb81aef/4ec39371/3822266359/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_julyeom?gpsid=5_73_2298&refcode=em18_180726_EOM2_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_EOM2_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+We+cant+let+Bob+Hugin+erase+his+misogyni") **[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ca8/3af3c5d/3bb81aef/4ec39370/3822266359/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_julyeom?gpsid=5_73_2298&refcode=em18_180726_EOM2_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_EOM2_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+DONATE")** Friend,

Bob Hugin's record shows he'll always fight for extreme right-wing beliefs and his well-connected friends, not New Jersey's diverse, hard-working families.

At Princeton, he fought against anti-discrimination policies for gay and lesbian students -- even going so far as to say that gay members of his club "wouldn't last long." And long after he graduated, Hugin defended his elite club, fighting the woman who sued for inclusion all the way to the state Supreme Court.

And then there is his record at Celgene where he ripped off cancer patients to make him and his buddies on Wall Street millions while working families suffered with sky-high drug prices.

After all this came to light, Hugin didn't even apologize.

[**Like his idol, Donald Trump, Hugin plans to spend millions more on TV ads with alternative facts -- and his strategy could work. clean_body: " Hugin slammed for anti-women, anti-gay record" \- New Jersey Globe, 7/22/18 "" "" Friend, Bob Hugin's record shows he'll always fight for extreme right-wing beliefs and his well-connected friends, not New Jersey's diverse, hard-working families. At Princeton, he fought against anti-discrimination policies for gay and lesbian students -- even going so far as to say that gay members of his club "wouldn't last long." And long after he graduated, Hugin defended his elite club, fighting the woman who sued for inclusion all the way to the state Supreme Court. And then there is his record at Celgene where he ripped off cancer patients to make him and his buddies on Wall Street millions while working families suffered with sky-high drug prices. After all this came to light, Hugin didn't even apologize. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Keep up the fight, Team Menendez "" | Paid for by Menendez for Senate Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible. "" ""

And to pay him back, Donald Trump just fundraised for him in Nevada, helping Senator Heller have his best fundraising quarter EVER. **(****[Give $5 or more right now to keep President Trump from buying Nevada's Senate seat for the GOP.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd185/4fbb2af3/7aebddcb/5e8b4591/3683272932/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg1MC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk850-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"))**

name: Republican Alert
subject: FWD: Did you miss this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: "Pie in the sky"? Please.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Nobody takes on more fights and wins more battles.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37adfe/7ab0e2c4/7ffa2ca6/349bd72b/3371103507/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07278A") Friend, Maryland's darn lucky to have a progressive champion like Ben Jealous running for governor. I'm rolling up my sleeves and getting to work for Team Jealous because, like me, Ben's a fighter who knows how to stand up for his values and win big for working folks. At a time when a lot of politicians run to the left or to the right, Ben's running toward the people. And that's exactly the kind of leader Maryland needs in the Governor's Mansion. But the Republican he's running against? He's a different story. I saw that he called Ben's plans for Maryland "pie in the sky." Really? Making sure that everyone in Maryland can get a good-paying job and access quality, affordable health care counts as pie in the sky? Only if you're more worried about collecting checks from big corporations than you are about getting things done for working people. Here's the problem, though: **Thanks to his corporate sponsors, Ben's Republican opponent has millions to spend, and that money's already being used for dishonest attack ads. So here's what I'm asking:** [**Ben needs to raise $60,000 online by July 31st -- donate $5 or more to fund the fight.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37adfe/7ab0e2c4/7ffa2ca6/349bd72b/3371103507/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07278A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37adfe/7ab0e2c4/7ffa2ca6/349bd72a/3371103507/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07278A&amount=5&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$25 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37adfe/7ab0e2c4/7ffa2ca6/349bd715/3371103507/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07278A&amount=25&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$50 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37adfe/7ab0e2c4/7ffa2ca6/349bd714/3371103507/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07278A&amount=50&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$100 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37adfe/7ab0e2c4/7ffa2ca6/349bd717/3371103507/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07278A&amount=100&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37adfe/7ab0e2c4/7ffa2ca6/349bd716/3371103507/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07278A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37adfe/7ab0e2c4/7ffa2ca6/349bd711/3371103507/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07278A&express_lane=true")
---
Why is Ben's race on my must-win list? Under the current administration, Maryland is stalling. Ben will be a champion for working Maryland families, starting with fully funding education by closing the $2.9 billion funding gap that's grown under this Republican governor. Ben will work to create universal pre-K and make college more affordable using revenue from criminal justice reform and legalizing marijuana. It's a bold agenda, but nobody is better suited to realize Maryland's potential than Ben.
I watched Ben lead the NAACP and saw firsthand his resolve and strength in the face of tough fights. Ben brought a fresh energy to the historic group and ushered in an era of unprecedented growth. He's helped lead the movement to abolish Maryland's death penalty and to protect DREAMers.
Bottom line: Nobody takes on more important fights, and nobody wins more battles, than my friend Ben Jealous.
So when Ben talks about a new path forward for Maryland, his plans aren't "pie in the sky" -- they are real, concrete policy proposals that will deliver the progress families need.
But it's up to us to make sure Ben gets the chance to deliver that progress as Maryland's next governor.
[**Ben needs the funds to get his winning progressive message out to voters right now -- donate $5 or more before this first end-of-month deadline to help him raise $60,000 by July 31st.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37adfe/7ab0e2c4/7ffa2ca6/349bd72b/3371103507/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07278A")
Thanks,
Elizabeth

clean_body: Nobody takes on more fights and wins more battles. | "" Friend, Maryland's darn lucky to have a progressive champion like Ben Jealous running for governor. I'm rolling up my sleeves and getting to work for Team Jealous because, like me, Ben's a fighter who knows how to stand up for his values and win big for working folks. At a time when a lot of politicians run to the left or to the right, Ben's running toward the people. And that's exactly the kind of leader Maryland needs in the Governor's Mansion. But the Republican he's running against? He's a different story. I saw that he called Ben's plans for Maryland "pie in the sky." Really? Making sure that everyone in Maryland can get a good-paying job and access quality, affordable health care counts as pie in the sky? Only if you're more worried about collecting checks from big corporations than you are about getting things done for working people. Here's the problem, though: Thanks to his corporate sponsors, Ben's Republican opponent has millions to spend, and that money's already being used for dishonest attack ads. So here's what I'm asking: "" Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" Why is Ben's race on my must-win list? Under the current administration, Maryland is stalling. Ben will be a champion for working Maryland families, starting with fully funding education by closing the $2.9 billion funding gap that's grown under this Republican governor. Ben will work to create universal pre-K and make college more affordable using revenue from criminal justice reform and legalizing marijuana. It's a bold agenda, but nobody is better suited to realize Maryland's potential than Ben. I watched Ben lead the NAACP and saw firsthand his resolve and strength in the face of tough fights. Ben brought a fresh energy to the historic group and ushered in an era of unprecedented growth. He's helped lead the movement to abolish Maryland's death penalty and to protect DREAMers. Bottom line: Nobody takes on more important fights, and nobody wins more battles, than my friend Ben Jealous. So when Ben talks about a new path forward for Maryland, his plans aren't "pie in the sky" -- they are real, concrete policy proposals that will deliver the progress families need. But it's up to us to make sure Ben gets the chance to deliver that progress as Maryland's next governor. "" Thanks, Elizabeth "" * PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

name: Jeff Sheridan, WolfForPa.com
subject: school funding could be slashed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Hello --

Scott Wagner has been lying to Pennsylvanians about Governor Wolf's record on education.

Tom has stood with Pennsylvania students since his first day in office. But Scott Wagner has failed them.

That's why we released a new video to set the record straight -- and we need your help to spread the word. **[Watch our new video now, then share it with a friend:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec382/73a2bc12/39b04380/1fce38c5/2635520015/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/WolfForPA/videos/981712362000498/")** | [](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec382/73a2bc12/39b04380/1fce38c5/2635520015/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/WolfForPA/videos/981712362000498/")
---

| [Share on Facebook ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec382/73a2bc12/39b04380/1fce38c5/2635520015/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/WolfForPA/videos/981712362000498/")
---
| [Share on Twitter ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec382/73a2bc12/39b04380/1fce38c4/2635520015/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/WolfForPA/status/1022830563315666945")
---
When Governor Wolf took office, Pennsylvania schools were suffering from the $1 billion in cuts that Scott Wagner had supported under Republican Governor Corbett.

Since Governor Wolf has taken office, he's fought to add $1 billion in new funding for PA schools -- which means more money for schools all across the commonwealth: rural, suburban and urban alike.

There's a very clear contrast in this race. The truth is that only one person supports cuts to Pennsylvania schools and that's Scott Wagner.

**Watch the video now -- then share it with your friends to show everyone that Scott Wagner will be detrimental to education in Pennsylvania:**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Wagner-Cuts-Schools](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec382/73a2bc12/39b04380/1fce38cb/2635520015/VEsD/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Wagner-Cuts-Schools")**

Thanks for helping us set the record straight,

Jeff Sheridan
Campaign Manager
Tom Wolf for Governor

Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

name: Team Scholten
subject: Steve King Even Lies to His Supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
Steve King recently sent out this email (below) to his supporters. As you can see, he claims that his**“Democratic challenger is receiving stacks of cash from a bunch of big-government, liberal elites.”**
**Wow.**
**For the record, our average donation to date has been $18.44**. And we’ve received contributions from over 12,000 individual donors!
If you want to know who really receives “stacks of cash” from “elites,” all you have to do is look at Steve King’s fundraising reports. **While J.D. has refused to accept any money from corporate PACs, 30% of Steve King’s money comes directly from corporate PACs.** And Steve King’s largest lifetime donor? None other than the **American Bankers Association.**
While Steve King tries to make this contest an ideological battle of “liberals vs. conservatives,” J.D. views this campaign as Main Streets vs Wall Street. We need someone who works to support the people and the small towns of this district, not the “elites” that Steve King feigns fear of while he quietly pockets their checks.
We’re going to need your continued support to make sure Steve King’s disingenuous messages don’t drown out the truth, while he continues to vote for a Wall Street agenda that makes risky bets which endanger our economy. **He might have the corporate checks on his side, but we have the people.** [**_Show your support for a true grassroots movement by matching our average gift with a donation of $18.44 today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1749847/9270425/-1643227540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWI4OWYzNy1jYjkxLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W0LTWIiKWX26GzdJ3yZjgLp_LjTczvpx0nDJ1b0WChA=)
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten

subject: 🚨TRIPLE MATCH ALERT 🚨
body:

Friends,

By now, I hope you've seen our first TV ad -- Mayor Andrew Gillum is tackling head on what everyone said at the beginning was impossible.

The son of a city bus driver and construction worker is on his way to making history and becoming the next Governor of Florida. And now that we have an extra boost, we need your help to set the pace in the final 32 days of the election.

Tuesday is our FINAL end-of-month deadline before the primary and what we raise now will show everyone we have the momentum to win. **We need to close out this month big.** **So, every donation given now until Tuesday at midnight will be _TRIPLE matched!_**

**[So, can I count on you to chip in $5 now?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37d7/9e00690/59ee3e31/2402f877/3486209835/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-july-eom?gpsid=13_55_2324&refcode=em18_180728_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180728_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__AE_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+FIRSTNAMESo+can+I+count+on+you+to+chip+i")**

name: Elise
subject: Demanding better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

If you read the headlines you know: There's rarely been a more important time in our lives for everyone to pay attention, get involved, and make our voices heard.

It's heartening to see so many Americans organizing not just to resist the chaos coming out of this Administration, but to insist on a better way forward for our nation.

We know we have to fight for policies that tackle climate change, lower prescription drug costs, and protect our democracy.

**Amy is working hard and standing up for our values in the Senate, but she can 't do it without your help. Will you help us hit our $50,000 end-of-month goal by making a contribution before Tuesday's deadline?**

name: Jason Yates
subject: [ALERT] Travel Warning from My Faith Votes
body:
Peter,
My Faith Votes is encouraging its friends and supporters to boycott travel to Turkey and Turkish Airlines until Pastor Andrew Brunson is freed.
Although many were happy to see that a Turkish court ordered Brunson to be removed from prison and placed under house arrest on Wednesday, due to health concerns, moving Brunson from prison to home detention is not enough.
We hope pastors nationwide will join us in urging their congregations to boycott Turkey. Now is the time to stand in solidarity with this American citizen who has been unjustly treated by the Turkish Government.
If it isn't safe for Brunson, it isn't safe for us.
Please pray for Pastor Brunson daily! [And be sure to subscribe to receive our important news updates to follow the situation](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Falerts-signup&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180727com01&n=1).
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180727com01&n=2)
**P.S.**
Pastor Andrew Brunson has lived in Turkey for over two decades. The government of Turkey arrested him in 2016 and for over a year he was held without charges. Turkey eventually accused him of “dividing and separating Turkey by simply spreading his Christian faith” according to Vice President Mike Pence.
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180727com01&n=3).

name: Jay Inslee
subject: FWD: We have a major choice in this country -- their way or our way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
To illustrate the point...

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78b30/2f5ea88d/7701f3b0/2cbc02bd/3840676584/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-27_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-07-27_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Graphics can only start to illustrate the great progress we've made here in Washington. We're passing laws to protect reproductive health care, voting rights, net neutrality, and our environment. We've sued the Trump administration to protect those coming to America seeking a better life for their children and we've made it clear that Washington will always be a place that welcomes and embraces people of all faiths, all nationalities, and all orientations. We're the #1 state economy in the country -- dispelling the Republican myth that progressive policies hurt our economy. And we're fighting for more progress every day, both for the residents of our state and as a model for the nation. We cannot stop now, friend. We need to invest in the progressive movement today, especially as we approach the critical 2018 midterms. While D.C. goes backwards, state governments must be the model for progressive leadership. [**We're at a critical point -- and we need you to step up before our end-of-month deadline. Can you chip in a few dollars for progress?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78b30/2f5ea88d/7701f3b0/2cbc02bd/3840676584/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-27_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-07-27_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema") | [CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78b30/2f5ea88d/7701f3b0/2cbc02bd/3840676584/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-27_eom-3&refcode=ema_2018-07-27_eom-3&utm_campaign=eom-3&utm_medium=ema")

Thanks so much.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

name: Team Beto
subject: Not enough people have watched Beto’s first ad. Can you help change that?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Yesterday, we launched our first campaign ad, all about what Beto’s been
up to since kicking off our grassroots campaign over a year ago.

It's also the first U.S. Senate campaign ad created entirely from live
stream footage -- ever.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180727&t=1001&akid=1524%2E444211%2E1VpppQ ]Watch Beto's first ad, then pitch in a donation of
$3
to help us reach more Texans and hit our end-of-month fundraising goal.
With election day right around the corner, and with a crucial fundraising
deadline coming up, we need to make sure as many Texans as possible watch
this.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180727&t=1002&akid=1524%2E444211%2E1VpppQ ]Beto for Texas

The ad features iPhone video shot in Lubbock, Fort Worth, El Paso, Dallas,
Austin, Georgetown, DeSoto, Waxahachie, San Benito, Bryan, San Marcos,
Amarillo, Galveston, Sonora, Houston, San Antonio, Garland, Missouri City,
Groveton, Tilden, Laredo, Alice and other towns Beto has visited during
his travels to all 254 counties of the state.

We called our new ad “Showing Up” because that’s what our people-powered
campaign is all about: showing up in every county across Texas, talking to
everyone, taking no one for granted.

You can help Beto by introducing more people to our campaign. That starts
by keeping this brand-new ad running for as long as possible -- which is
going to take resources.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180727&t=1003&akid=1524%2E444211%2E1VpppQ ]We need to reach our end-of-month fundraising goal of $200,000 if we’re
going to stick to our plan of making sure Texans everywhere see our new
ad. Watch it today, then chip in
$3
to help us keep it running.

Thanks,

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180727&t=1004&akid=1524%2E444211%2E1VpppQ ]Contribute
$3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=1524%2E444211%2E1VpppQ

With election day right around the corner, and with a crucial fundraising deadline coming up, we need to make sure as many Texans as possible watch this. [ ]Beto for Texas The ad features iPhone video shot in Lubbock, Fort Worth, El Paso, Dallas, Austin, Georgetown, DeSoto, Waxahachie, San Benito, Bryan, San Marcos, Amarillo, Galveston, Sonora, Houston, San Antonio, Garland, Missouri City, Groveton, Tilden, Laredo, Alice and other towns Beto has visited during his travels to all 254 counties of the state. We called our new ad “Showing Up” because that’s what our people-powered campaign is all about: showing up in every county across Texas, talking to everyone, taking no one for granted. You can help Beto by introducing more people to our campaign. That starts by keeping this brand-new ad running for as long as possible -- which is going to take resources. [ ]We need to reach our end-of-month fundraising goal of $200,000 if we’re going to stick to our plan of making sure Texans everywhere see our new ad. Watch it today, then chip in $3 to help us keep it running. Thanks, Team Beto [ ]Contribute $3 Contribute to Beto's campaign:

subject: Because they voted to defund Planned Parenthood, repeal Obamacare, or roll back equal pay...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4da5/24c69fd9/27379ad30/1885b164/3203941643/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES67N_digital_email_20180727_EOMOnNotice_inact&source=WQEFES67N_digital_email_20180727_EOMOnNotice_inact")
---

Peter,

A year ago today, we put 48 House Republicans "On Notice" for their anti-choice, anti-woman votes.

It's our biggest Republican opposition program _ever_ because we are determined to take every last one of their seats.

And to date, we've endorsed 43 women to turn red seats blue.

**[Donate $3 to help reach our $300,000 End-of-Month goal and elect pro-choice Democratic women to replace On Notice Republicans in the House.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4da5/24c69fd9/27379ad30/1885b165/3203941643/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180727_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+reach+our+300000+EndofM&utm_campaign=WQEFES67N_digital_email_20180727_EOMOnNotice_inact&source=WQEFES67N_digital_email_20180727_EOMOnNotice_inact")**

We launched such an ambitious program last year because we knew replacing these Republicans was a cause worth fighting for.

Dozens of them repeatedly voted to defund Planned Parenthood, repeal Obamacare, or roll back equal pay legislation (or _all three_).

And just last week, news broke that On Notice Republican Rep. Jason Lewis (MN-02) lamented not being able to call women "sluts" anymore.

We've endorsed Angie Craig to replace him.

If we can help elect her and the other women we've endorsed to replace these Republicans, flipping the House is well within reach.

**Donate $3 to help reach our $300,000 End-of-Month goal and elect pro-choice Democratic women to the House:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-July-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4da5/24c69fd9/27379ad30/1885b166/3203941643/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180727_email_JulyEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitJulyGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFES67N_digital_email_20180727_EOMOnNotice_inact&source=WQEFES67N_digital_email_20180727_EOMOnNotice_inact")**

Thanks,

Christina Reynolds
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

body:
All of us Team Hawley wanted to take one more opportunity to thank President Trump for visiting Missouri Josh Hawley
Hello Peter,

All of us Team Hawley wanted to take one more opportunity to thank President Trump for visiting Missouri, and to thank all of you who showed your support.

Josh is right - President Trump needs reinforcements in Washington, and Josh has shown time and again that he is up to the job. As Attorney General, Josh has proven that he will put the interests of Missouri ahead of any powerful outside group, and that he will never back down from a fight to defend our freedoms.

President Trump came to Missouri this week because he knows that we need someone like Josh in the Senate. Congress needs more leaders who have the dedication, the drive, and the experience to bring our conservative values to D.C.

Here in Missouri, we know that candidate is Josh Hawley.

We know Josh will fight for us, so join us in standing with him. [Show your support and donate today](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0abfc12fc01a4a9091e4863c66d79463&_e=BV8P_C1o9VKoCkUlCuHp3ZIbPICUSfQRzXI56WMqAlusp2GQPAwBinJ_lgze1WYkOO4x6CcvhkTyWVOQxVRivbq4yr0Hgu44CVkrCLtB_e0PO8CuTzRzJC1_FG5JohxH0G81i-CNshDGsyf04RsQ-tKg5NXj8xQF3CTzwL6fF0g_iZZa6JfOt86Ht8O7536oHvOex-EvYPogv8hgvwMIZ_hFx0WqJvGJWnzjLWzMEq82al-Px2nE98QliWsl_g2fcozOqnpkbMN5H0_0R3FwxUVCZY2GwNpQWFd-oxsySDxN68UZVOnY1if_jl51MgjfHmE2dniZettYOTk2PKsOrNpo3gKCXUPrtEPIgAPSoUYmS_dh-ID-SgMFQN5jygTJ). name: Barb & Christina, Team Sisolak
subject: We're freaked out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/CbOt6EhUIYKBK3tdPN-moTg67b8ZHFqd5OEJ8POHlF8=/o-CU24Vo97TNMhoEGX9MmzyJCPPESOBLsdq8iC1fBG4=?gpsid=37_57_2366&refcode=em18_180727_choice_fnd_gq_act_op_bsca_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180727_choice_fnd_gq_act_op_bsca_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---

**BREAKING: "I enthusiastically support the president's choice."**
**-- _Adam Laxalt on Brett Kavanaugh,
Washington Examiner, July 27, 2018_**

**Nevada needs a governor who will lead our state into the future - not
follow Washington Republicans into the past.**
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/CbOt6EhUIYKBK3tdPN-moTg67b8ZHFqd5OEJ8POHlF8=/o-CU24Vo97TNMhoEGX9MmzyJCPPESOBLsdq8iC1fBG4=?gpsid=37_57_2366&refcode=em18_180727_choice_fnd_gq_act_op_bsca_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180727_choice_fnd_gq_act_op_bsca_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

Hello --

Talk about a rude awakening.

This morning we woke up to Adam Laxalt's op-ed voicing his full support for Donald Trump's Supreme Court nominee, Brett Kavanaugh -- a man picked in large part because of his expected opposition to reproductive rights.

We can't say we're surprised. After all, as attorney general, Laxalt lobbied the Supreme Court to back abortion bans in other states, supported shady "clinics" that discourage women from learning about their reproductive rights, and even said he'd "look into" repealing a law guaranteeing access to abortion in Nevada.

**[Team, with reproductive rights under attack in Washington, it's more important than ever that we elect a governor who supports a woman's right to choose. Chip in $3 to help Steve Sisolak defeat Adam Laxalt.](https://act.myngp.com/el/CbOt6EhUIYKBK3tdPN-moTg67b8ZHFqd5OEJ8POHlF8=/o-CU24Vo97TNMhoEGX9MmzyJCPPESOBLsdq8iC1fBG4=?gpsid=37_57_2366&refcode=em18_180727_choice_fnd_gq_act_op_bsca_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180727_choice_fnd_gq_act_op_bsca_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

The issue of women's access to abortion is settled. The Supreme Court made the law clear in _Roe v. Wade_ -- but that's not stopping Adam Laxalt or Brett Kavanaugh.

Steve believes that health care decisions are personal, not political. With attacks coming from Washington Republicans, Steve will protect a woman's right to choose.

**[Adam Laxalt's gushing support for Kavanaugh only confirms what we already knew: he'll take Nevada backward. Help Steve Sisolak stop him -- chip in right now!](https://act.myngp.com/el/CbOt6EhUIYKBK3tdPN-moTg67b8ZHFqd5OEJ8POHlF8=/o-CU24Vo97TNMhoEGX9MmzyJCPPESOBLsdq8iC1fBG4=?gpsid=37_57_2366&refcode=em18_180727_choice_fnd_gq_act_op_bsca_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180727_choice_fnd_gq_act_op_bsca_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Thanks,

Barb Solish & Christina Amestoy
Team Sisolak

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/CbOt6EhUIYKBK3tdPN-moTg67b8ZHFqd5OEJ8POHlF8=/o-CU24Vo97TNMhoEGX9MmzyJCPPESOBLsdq8iC1fBG4=?gpsid=37_57_2366&refcode=em18_180727_choice_fnd_gq_act_op_bsca_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180727_choice_fnd_gq_act_op_bsca_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: What I’ve been up to this summer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Team --
This summer I’ve been traveling around Tennessee to help open grassroots offices in communities big and small where volunteers and supporters are gathering to help us make calls, meet up to go door-to-door, and have the conversations with neighbors that will help us win in November.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1751892/9279806/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTJiNzViMy1lMDkxLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCFKjEWZZgb5ysJW0wMWT91NMB_2Rvr6i1B5eFwJMFY=&refcode=em180727-pre-primary-deadline-miss&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=15)
I’ve been humbled by our campaign’s momentum up to this point in the race. We still have another few months ahead of us before Election Day, but we’re proving to the Washington establishment that Tennesseans want to put an end to the hyper-partisanship dominating our politics.
And they’re willing to work to put an end to it.
**We’re proving that anything is possible when people come together to get things done.**
[**That’s why our grassroots fundraising deadlines matter, and why you’re getting these emails from my team. Can you chip in $15 or whatever you can ahead of next week’s pre-primary deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1751893/9279807/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTJiNzViMy1lMDkxLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCFKjEWZZgb5ysJW0wMWT91NMB_2Rvr6i1B5eFwJMFY=&refcode=em180727-pre-primary-deadline-miss&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=15)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1751894/9279808/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTJiNzViMy1lMDkxLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCFKjEWZZgb5ysJW0wMWT91NMB_2Rvr6i1B5eFwJMFY=&refcode=em180727-pre-primary-deadline-miss&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=15)**
With your help, we’ll have the resources we need to keep opening grassroots offices, running TV and radio ads, and putting our message in front of voters.
**Thanks to you, we’ll win in November the right way.**
All my best,
— Phil Bredesen

clean_body: Team -- This summer I’ve been traveling around Tennessee to help open grassroots offices in communities big and small where volunteers and supporters are gathering to help us make calls, meet up to go door-to-door, and have the conversations with neighbors that will help us win in November. I’ve been humbled by our campaign’s momentum up to this point in the race. We still have another few months ahead of us before Election Day, but we’re proving to the Washington establishment that Tennesseans want to put an end to the hyper-partisanship dominating our politics. And they’re willing to work to put an end to it. We’re proving that anything is possible when people come together to get things done. With your help, we’ll have the resources we need to keep opening grassroots offices, running TV and radio ads, and putting our message in front of voters. Thanks to you, we’ll win in November the right way. All my best, — Phil Bredesen PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209

name: Finance Update (via Kyrsten Sinema HQ)
subject: Breitbart in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
---
| | **Republicans will do whatever it takes to win in Arizona. Allies of Mitch McConnell and Karl Rove are dumping HUGE amounts of money into the state to hold on to the open Senate seat.

Kyrsten Sinema has incredible momentum, but she's going to need a lot of grassroots support to keep up with the dark money flooding in for her GOP opponents.

_[Contribute $10 today to keep her campaign strong>>](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-july18?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+Contribute+ask+today+to+keep+her+campaig&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_90D_180727_1_1&source=KS_EM_FR_90D_180727_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_FR_90D_180727_1_1")_**

|
---

First, Mike Pence came to Arizona and praised Sheriff Joe Arpaio as a "champion" of "the rule of law."

Then, a dark money group with ties to Mitch McConnell and Karl Rove spent more than $500,000 on TV ads boosting their handpicked GOP candidate.

Now, Breitbart funder and Trump campaign mega-donor Robert Mercer is using his fortune to support one of Kyrsten's GOP opponents.

**[Luckily, we have supporters like you on our side to make sure Kyrsten can fight back against the dishonest attacks already coming her way. Can you help with a contribution of $10 today?>>](http://act.kyrstensinema. **********[Donate $100 now](http://act.kyrstensinema. ******[Other amount](http://act.kyrstensinema. It's absolutely crucial we have the resources to fight back in the months ahead. With the election just about 100 days away now, we need to know we can count on your support to get Kyrsten to the Senate.

Thanks for helping out. Every dollar counts.

_The Finance Team at Sinema for Arizona_

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Not exaggerating (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Here's a thought that should get us all fired up. **Thanks to the passage of the Fair Districts Amendments, Democrats in November have a number of competitive seats that we can win.** My team and I have been working day and night campaigning in Florida. We have critical races up and down the ticket. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Will you join me and sign up as a Citizen Cosponsor of the No Money Bail Act?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Support my bill to end cash bail.
#

Sisters And Brothers -
Here is a simple truth — no one in our country should be sitting in jail just because they are poor.
Unfortunately, that is not the case.
Right now, there are over 700,000 people in county or city jails — sixty-five percent of them, more than 400,000 people, have not been convicted of a crime. Many are locked up simply because they cannot afford bail.
Let me be clear. The United States of America has criminalized poverty and that is not acceptable.
That is why this week I introduced the No Money Bail Act in the Senate to stop this horrific practice.
**[Will you join me and sign up as a Citizen Cosponsor of the No Money Bail Act?](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/no-money-bail-act?source=em180727-full&t=1&akid=63%2E150750%2EcmkYBX)**
The United States has a broken criminal justice system. We have over 2 million people in jail, more than any other nation on earth, and they are disproportionately African-American, Latino, and Native American. We spend $80 billion a year keeping people behind bars, money which could be used for education, job creation and affordable housing.
The decision to put someone behind bars should never be decided based on how much money a person has, or what kind of mood the judge is in on a given day, or even what judge the case happens to come before. In a country where we pride ourselves on the principle “innocent until proven guilty,” we should not be keeping hundreds of thousands of people locked up before they have actually been convicted of a crime simply because they can’t afford bail.
Those who can’t afford bail, even when they are innocent, face punishments that could impact them for the rest of their lives. After spending weeks in jail, many lose their jobs and have trouble finding new work after they are released. With a loss of income, they aren't able to pay their rent and may find themselves homeless. They may even lose custody of their children. And they were not guilty of any crime other than being poor.
The No Money Bail Act is simple. It ends the use of cash bail in federal courts. At the same time, it works with state and local governments to end this broken and destructive system in every area of the country.
The time has come to end "debtors' prisons" in the United States.
**[Will you join me and sign up as a Citizen Cosponsor of the No Money Bail Act?](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/no-money-bail-act?source=em180727-full&t=2&akid=63%2E150750%2EcmkYBX)**
Four words are engraved on the front of the Supreme Court: Equal Justice Under Law.
We are very far from that ideal today. Let’s fight for this legislation to bring us one step closer.
Let’s get to work.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/no-money-bail-act?source=em180727-full&t=3&akid=63%2E150750%2EcmkYBX)****
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=63%2E150750%2EcmkYBX). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&akid=63%2E150750%2EcmkYBX).

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: BREAKING: Ohio toss-up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Here in Ohio, we have a **special election** in less than two weeks. Ohio's 12th congressional district is our last chance to flip a seat from red to blue before November. Democrat Danny O'Connor is fighting hard against a lot of outside cash -- and he's made some headway. **_Sabato's Crystal Ball_ just moved this race to a toss-up.** These next two weeks will make all the difference in this key race. [**Danny needs to boost his GOTV efforts -- and fast. Can you help us flip this seat by rushing in a contribution right now?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff83d/4462dc26/6a7e66c5/20077e12/1115128286/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzI3eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180727z?refcode=sbe180727z_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be evenly split between Danny O'Connor and Sherrod Brown:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff83d/4462dc26/6a7e66c5/20077e11/1115128286/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzI3eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180727z?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180727z_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff83d/4462dc26/6a7e66c5/20077e11/1115128286/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzI3eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180727z?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180727z_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff83d/4462dc26/6a7e66c5/20077e12/1115128286/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzI3eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180727z?refcode=sbe180727z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** When I said Danny is fighting "a lot" of outside cash, I'm not joking. The National Republican Congressional Committee already spent almost $600,000 against Danny. The Congressional Leadership Fund **spent $2 million** attacking him. A different candidate may have already thrown in the towel, but not Danny. As the other side outspends him, Danny is all-in with a grassroots effort: he and his team are going door-to-door, talking to people about his platform, and asking them for their support. All his work is paying huge dividends. **Danny's brought this district from deep-red to toss-up.** With our help, maybe Danny can bring it all the way to a win. [**Help Danny and his team by pitching in whatever you can _right now._**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff83d/4462dc26/6a7e66c5/20077e12/1115128286/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzI3eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180727z?refcode=sbe180727z_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Thank you, Sherrod

clean_body: | | | Peter, Here in Ohio, we have a special election in less than two weeks. Ohio's 12th congressional district is our last chance to flip a seat from red to blue before November. Democrat Danny O'Connor is fighting hard against a lot of outside cash -- and he's made some headway. Sabato's Crystal Ball just moved this race to a toss-up. These next two weeks will make all the difference in this key race. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be evenly split between Danny O'Connor and Sherrod Brown: "" "" "" "" When I said Danny is fighting "a lot" of outside cash, I'm not joking. The National Republican Congressional Committee already spent almost $600,000 against Danny. The Congressional Leadership Fund spent $2 million attacking him. A different candidate may have already thrown in the towel, but not Danny. name: Lindsay Coleman
subject: we're not leaving early
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
It might be Friday -- but here at Team O'Halleran, we don't have time
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633873/1a8421e1/1a4cec9ef/48717cba/4268463301/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
---
Team, _It might be Friday_ \-- but here at Team O'Halleran, we're not leaving the office early. **We 're gearing up for our first end-of-month fundraising push**. Our deadline is Tuesday, and after crunching the numbers, I've calculated that we need to raise another **$6,852** by then to meet our goal and re-elect Tom. We don't have much time, and I know you're busy, so I'm just going to come out and ask: [**Can you make a donation of any size to get us on track to hit our goal this month?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.27_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **Team, I wouldn 't be asking if this deadline weren't important. **Tom was recently named THE MOST VULNERABLE Democrat in the ENTIRE HOUSE, and the GOP is desperate to flip AZ-01 from blue to red, _so every single dollar is going to matter._ _**We 're up against Joe Arpaio, the Koch brothers, and BIG super PAC money. **_But with enough grit and enough help from grassroots Democrats like you, we'll make sure Tom wins re-election and can keep standing up for Arizona families in Congress. [**Please consider making a donation before you leave for the weekend -- it will really make a difference.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.27_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Lindsay Coleman Finance Director | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.27_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633873/1a8421e1/1a4cec9ef/48717cbe/4268463301/VEsB/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633873/1a8421e1/1a4cec9ef/48717cbf/4268463301/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

Please take just a moment to read this, team - it could make or break Democrats' chances to take back the Senate this year.
**Nate Silver reports that Democrats _can_ take back the Senate - but ONLY if we win in Nevada. **And the GOP is throwing in every resource it has to defeat us and make sure that doesn't happen.
Just weeks after Trump came to Nevada, Dean Heller had his best fundraising quarter **EVER** , and the race couldn't be closer: The last **THREE** polls have us within the margin of error. Now, a Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC is getting ready to spend **$11.2 MILLION** to tip the scales and keep Nevada (and the Senate) red.
**That's why this news couldn't have come at a better time: A group of donors just offered to MATCH every gift we receive until our huge end-of-month deadline.**
_POLITICO_ reported that this could be one of the most expensive races in the entire country - **so there's no way we can win in Nevada unless every single grassroots supporter, including you, friend, takes advantage of critical match opportunities like this one.**
